item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 052300Z AUTO 00000KT 8000 -RA BKN004 BKN020 OVC048 12/11 Q1009 TEMPO 4000 -SHRA BKN012TCU
🟡 TAF LFOT 051700Z 0518/0618 33006KT 9999 SCT012 SCT050 TEMPO 0518/0614 4000 -SHRA BKN012TCU PROB30 TEMPO 0518/0523 -TSRA BKN012CB PROB40 TEMPO 0518/0609 BKN006
